title: A system and method for eliminating glare
abstract: Described herein is a method for substantially eliminating glare from an optical detector's field of vision, the method comprising (i) generating a glare occluder at a position on a glare shield where a glare source in an optical detector's field of vision is located, (ii) adjusting one or more characteristics of the glare occluder if misalignment between a shadow cast by the glare occluder over the optical detector and the optical detector is detected, and (iii) removing the glare occluder from the glare shield upon determination that the glare source no longer falls within the optical detector's field of vision. Further described herein is a system for facilitating the foregoing method.
